title: B9.5 personal assistant identity and everyday capability roadmap repair
summary: B9.5 identity repair focus is complete and superseded by B9.8 local scan bridge and Operator Mode local capability phase.
body: This focus record is archived. B9.5 established personal-assistant identity and honest missing-tool boundaries. Active focus has moved to B9.8 local host scan bridge, hardware/system visibility, and Operator Mode local capability stabilization.

facts.statement: B9.5 focus is archived and superseded by the B9.8 local scan bridge and Operator Mode local capability phase.
Identity repair remains valid, but it is no longer the active focus lane.

evidence: B9.5 scope completed and moved to archived status during B9.8.2 brain/config refresh.
